title: Minty's Silly Fakemon!
description: A Addon for Cobblemon dedicated to famous old timey Cartoon Characters as Fakemon!
body:
# Welcome to my silly fantasy!

In this Resource pack, the Fakemons are all added with love! (god that sounds cringey)

Nonetheless, Here's the current Fakemons added to the Pack:

Inkly (Dark/Poison)
Blinkling (Dark/Poison)
Bunink (Dark/Poison) _(Dark/Fairy for the female variant)_

I hope you enjoy!! ^^
